title: Flaming Fire Aspect
description: Flamey swords when renamed and with fire aspect. (WITH DYNAMIC LIGHTS)
body:
Adds flames to your sword/spear when it has fire aspect.

AND WORKS WITH DYNAMIC LIGHTS (So a flaming sword works like holding a torch in your hand)

Also adds green sparkles when it has fortune/looting.

you swill need to rename your sword/spear if you want soulfire on your netherite sword/spear or green flames on your copper sword/spear.
like this:

"Soulfire Netherite Sword"

"Green Flaming Copper Spear"

![sword gif](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/YMhSvG2k/images/b304c438c1ff4779e7c35bf1c269c06fadfbd928.gif)

![swords](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/YMhSvG2k/images/3566e37a23612c933c18f544473bee434810929b.png)

![spears](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/YMhSvG2k/images/357525e4f244c2caab354ad0d8d45be3f3f8cae6.png)
